name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13656 Cream Embossing】 This season's Nano Noé backpack features an exquisite two-tone design, suitable for both day and night looks. Crafted in leather with a gold chain strap, the lighter Monogram embossed pattern is accented with contrasting borders. The interior offers ample space for daily essentials like a phone, small wallet, and lipstick. 19 x 15 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width)
